hero.headline:
Your Life.
Your Training.
Your Data.
hero.subline: MyLife connects training, nutrition, and personal development in one intelligent ecosystem — for everyone who wants to get more out of themselves.

ecosystem.title: Three Apps. One Vision.
ecosystem.subtitle: MyLife is more than a fitness app — it's a holistic system that connects all areas of your health and development.

apps.name: MyLife Training
apps.description: Log workouts, create individual training plans and track your progress with meaningful analytics.

apps.name: MyLife Nutrition
apps.description: Track calories and macros, connect nutrition data directly with your training and get personalized recommendations.

apps.name: MyLife Improvement
apps.description: The AI-powered intelligence layer that combines training data, nutrition, wearables and mental health into holistic insights.

training.title: MyLife Training
training.subtitle: Fully functional and actively in development. Start structured training today.

features.title: Workout Logging
features.description: Record exercises, sets, reps and weights precisely and clearly.

features.title: Training Plan Creation
features.description: Create and manage individual training plans tailored exactly to your goals.

features.title: Progress Analytics
features.description: Visualize your performance development over time and identify trends in your training.

features.title: Flexible Workout Structures
features.description: Supports various training types — from strength training to bodyweight exercises.

features.title: Quick Entry
features.description: Minimal effort when logging — so you can focus on training.

nutrition.title: MyLife Nutrition
nutrition.subtitle: Nutrition and training belong together. MyLife Nutrition will close the gap.
nutrition.description: Most fitness apps treat training and nutrition separately. MyLife Nutrition will connect both seamlessly — so you understand how your nutrition affects your training and vice versa.

features.title: Calorie & Macro Tracking
features.description: Precise logging of calories, proteins, carbohydrates and fats.

features.title: Training-Nutrition Integration
features.description: Connect nutrition data directly with your training data for holistic insights.

features.title: Personalized Meal Recommendations
features.description: AI-based suggestions for optimal meals around training.

features.title: Hydration Tracking
features.description: Keep track of your fluid intake — especially essential after intense sessions.

features.title: Nutrition Analytics
features.description: Understand your eating habits through clear dashboards and trends.

nutrition.notifyLabel: Notify me when Nutrition is available

improvement.title: MyLife Improvement
improvement.subtitle: The intelligence layer that brings everything together.
improvement.description: MyLife Improvement is the third pillar of the ecosystem — an AI-powered platform that combines data from training, nutrition, wearables and mental health into a complete picture of your performance.
benefits: Personalized scorecard of your health & performance
AI recommendations based on all your data
Pattern recognition across training, sleep and nutrition
Prioritized action recommendations for maximum impact

comparison.title: MyLife vs. the Competition
comparison.subtitle: Why MyLife is different from existing solutions.
competitorDescriptions: Strong food database & AI nutrition recommendations, but no integrated training system.
Excellent GPS tracking & community for endurance athletes, but no nutrition integration.
Wearable integration & sleep tracking, but less focus on structured training planning.

roadmap.title: The Future of MyLife
roadmap.subtitle: These features are planned and not yet available in the current Beta.

items.title: AI-Powered Workouts & Coaching
items.description: Adaptive training recommendations that automatically adjust based on your performance and goals.

items.title: Real-Time Form Analysis
items.description: Camera-based feedback on your exercise form in real time.

items.title: Intelligent Recovery Planning
items.description: AI suggestions for rest days or lighter sessions based on training intensity and sleep.

items.title: Personalized Nutrition
items.description: Automatic calorie adjustments, post-workout meal suggestions and hydration reminders.

items.title: Community & Gamification
items.description: Group challenges, achievement sharing, leaderboards and reward systems.

items.title: Mental Health
items.description: Guided meditation, breathing exercises, stress detection and mood journaling.

items.title: Wearable Integration
items.description: Automatic syncing of heart rate, sleep and stress data from Apple Watch, Fitbit, Garmin and more.

items.title: Offline & Flexible Workouts
items.description: Downloadable workouts for on the go and support for various session lengths.

cta.title: Ready to transform your life?
cta.subtitle: Start today with MyLife Training — free, no credit card required.
cta.newsletterSubtitle: Be the first to know when Nutrition and Improvement become available.

footer.tagline: Your ecosystem for training, nutrition and personal development.
